---
mode: agent
description: "Show the current state of the agent pipeline queue. Usage: /pipeline-status"
---

<!-- GENERATED BY `harness sync` — edit harness/commands/pipeline-status.md instead. -->

Read `harness/queue/agent-queue.json` and print a clear status report covering:

- Current spec being implemented (`currentSpec`).
- Current stage (`currentStage`) and status (`status`).
- Files implemented so far (`implementedFiles`), if any.
- Files tested so far (`testFiles`), if any.
- Any blocking issues or open questions referenced in the latest plan.

Then list every plan file in `harness/plans/` with its last modified time so the user can scan the full history.

If the queue file does not exist or is empty, say:

> No active implementation in progress. Use `/implement <spec-name>` to start.
